sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date Date, relative_day UInt32);
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_date, relative_day) VALUES (toDate('1993-10-05'), toRelativeDayNum(toDate('1993-10-05')));
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_date, relative_day) VALUES (toDate('2000-09-20'), toRelativeDayNum(toDate('2000-09-20')));
UPDATE test_dates SET relative_day = toRelativeDayNum(event_date) WHERE event_date < toDate('2000-01-01');
SELECT event_date, relative_day FROM test_dates WHERE relative_day > 1000;
